raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Coastal wetlands can store five times more carbon than tropical rainforests.",
    "Coastal wetlands can store 50 times more carbon in their surrounding soil than tropical rainforests.",
    "Blue carbon is the process by which carbon is captured by ocean and coastal ecosystems.",
    "California has lost over 90 percent of its historical wetlands.",
    "Restoration of blue carbon is essential in protecting coastal communities from the harmful impacts of the climate crisis.",
    "Restoration of blue carbon can ensure long-term conservation of coastal habitats and build climate resiliency."
```
